commands.raw_help:
root@kali:~# hexstrike_mcp -h
 usage: hexstrike_mcp.py [-h] [--server SERVER] [--timeout TIMEOUT] [--debug]
 
 Run the HexStrike AI MCP Client
 
 options:
 -h, --help         show this help message and exit
 --server SERVER    HexStrike AI API server URL (default:
                    http://127.0.0.1:8888)
 --timeout TIMEOUT  Request timeout in seconds (default: 300)
 --debug            Enable debug logging

binary_metadata.file_type: POSIX shell script, ASCII text executable

apt_metadata.depends: mitmproxy, python3-aiohttp, python3-bs4, python3-flask, python3-mcp, python3-psutil, python3-pwntools, python3-requests, python3-selenium, python3:any
apt_metadata.recommends: aircrack-ng, amass, arjun, arp-scan, autopsy, autorecon, binutils, binwalk, bulk-extractor, burpsuite, checksec, dirb, dirsearch, dnsenum, dotdotpwn, enum4linux-ng, evil-winrm, exploitdb, feroxbuster, ffuf, fierce, foremost, gdb, ghidra, gobuster, hakrawler, hash-identifier, hashcat, hashcat-utils, httpie, hydra, john, kismet, libimage-exiftool-perl, maltego, masscan, medusa, metasploit-framework, netexec, nikto, nmap, nuclei, ophcrack, paramspider, patator, radare2, recon-ng, responder, ropper, scalpel, sherlock, sleuthkit, spiderfoot, sqlmap, steghide, subfinder, testdisk, theharvester, trivy, tshark, wafw00f, wfuzz, wireshark, wordlists, wpscan, xsser, xxd, zaproxy
apt_metadata.description:
AI-Powered MCP Cybersecurity Automation Platform
This package contains an HexStrike AI MCP v6.0 which features a multi-agent
architecture with autonomous AI agents, intelligent decision-making, and
vulnerability intelligence.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use hexstrike_mcp because ### hexstrike-ai.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `hexstrike_mcp.py [-h] [--server SERVER] [--timeout TIMEOUT] [--debug]` as documented upstream for hexstrike_mcp.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair hexstrike_mcp with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `hexstrike_mcp --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install hexstrike-ai. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `hexstrike_mcp.py [-h] [--server SERVER] [--timeout TIMEOUT] [--debug]`.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: ### hexstrike-ai.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install hexstrike-ai
Install with: sudo apt install hexstrike-ai
